Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Karen Fransworth.
Atty. DIANE M. COMI, Esq. for Petitioner: Mary Jane Babour Xayasounthone, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor Claimant: Akela Nang Xayasounthone, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $ 666,956.31; Total allowance for fees and expenses -$2,702,754.30.
A net balance of the settlement of $1,297.245.70 to be deposited to the Community Bank of San Joaquin as trustee of the Akela Nany Xayasounthone Settlement Trust. Terms of the trust is attached as Attachment 12 of the Order. Order signed in open court.

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action; Appendicx
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Continued To Feb-08-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Quash Depos Or For Protective Order And For Stay
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Kaiser Foundation Hospitals' Motion To Quash Depositions Or For Protective Order And For Stay is granted as it seeks to quash the deposition subpoenas as they are overly broad and seek irrelevant evidence without good cause. The motion is granted as it seeks a protective order barring discovery as to the health care contract except where necessary to resolve material conflicts in the evidence. Plaintiff has made no showing of any conflicts in the evidence that rise to the level of good cause for taking such discovery. Every allegation contained in the declarations in support of the petition for arbitration is not subject to discovery. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
